pi_items.verified_value: Stanford University - legitimate public 3D scanning dataset created 1994 by Greg Turk and Marc Levoy
pi_items.source: Web search - Wikipedia, Stanford Graphics Lab, GitHub repository information

privileged_info_summary: The task claims to use a model file called 'bunny.obj' from a specific GitHub URL, but this URL returns 404. The actual file in the repository is 'stanford-bunny.obj', which is the famous Stanford Bunny 3D model (35,947 vertices, 69,451 faces) created by 3D scanning at Stanford University. The model is not synthetic data but a legitimate, well-known public dataset. The correct URL is https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alecjacobson/common-3d-test-models/master/data/stanford-bunny.obj. Task requirements for placement location (front_yard) and visibility threshold (500 pixels) are reasonable and verifiable through agent action observation.
